ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
COURTNEY WIMBERLEY Plaintiff.
DL Rencher, Esq. 415-877-4486 of Rencher Law Group, Moving party.

RULING - A R G U E D.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Rencher Lw Group, Atty. DL Rencher's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF COURTNEY WIMBERLEY.

Granted. Mr. Rencher to submit a proposed order on the judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF COURTNEY WIMBERLEY is continued to January 12, 2023 at 9:30am, Law and Motion Dept. for counsel fo record to appear. Mr. Ruezga to give notice.
